items.kk: Менің екі ағам және бір апам бар.
items.en: I have two brothers and one sister.
My parents live in Aktobe.
My grandmother is seventy years old.
Are you married?

items.kk: Мен бес жылдан бері үйлі адаммын.
items.en: I have been married for five years.
We have two children.
My son is eight years old.
My daughter is studying at university.
My older brother got married last year.
My younger sister is still at school.
I work in a company.

items.kk: Мен мұнда үш жылдан бері жұмыс істеймін.
items.en: I have been working here for three years.
My salary is paid monthly.
I am looking for a new job.
What do you do for work?
I am a programmer.
I went to university in Almaty.
I graduated three years ago.
I would like to change jobs.
The meeting starts at ten o'clock.
I called you yesterday.
My phone is not working.

items.kk: Мен саған кейін қайта қоңырау шаламын.
items.en: I will call you back.
Can I borrow your charger?
I lost my wallet.
I enjoy cooking.
I do not know how to swim.
I used to play football when I was young.

items.kk: Мен аптасына үш рет спортзалға барамын.
items.en: I go to the gym three times a week.
What are your hobbies?
I enjoy reading historical books.
She sings very well.
He plays the dombra.
I watch films on weekends.
Do you like travelling?
I have been to Russia twice.

items.kk: Мен бір күні Жапонияға барғым келеді.
items.en: I want to visit Japan one day.

items.kk: Сен барған ең әдемі жер қайсы?
items.en: What is the most beautiful place you have visited?
I think Almaty is a beautiful city.
What do you think?
I agree with you.
I do not agree.
In my opinion, this is correct.
Could you help me, please?
Of course. What do you need?
Thank you very much.
You are welcome. It is nothing.
Excuse me, I am sorry.
It does not matter.
Have a good day!
Let's go to a restaurant tonight.
A table for two, please.
Could I see the menu?
What do you recommend?

items.kk: Мен қой етінен жасалған сорпа аламын.
items.en: I will have the lamb soup.
The food here is excellent.
Could we have the bill, please?
Is the tip included?
I am allergic to nuts.
Do you have vegetarian options?
I need to go to the bank.
I would like to open an account.
What is the exchange rate today?
I need to send money abroad.
Please sign here.

lessons.title: Health, Banking & Hotel Check-In
lessons.titleNative: Денсаулық, банк ісі және қонақ үйге кіру

items.en: I need to see a doctor.
My stomach has been hurting since yesterday.
I have a high temperature.

items.kk: Бұл дәріні күніне үш рет қабылдаңыз.
items.en: Take this medicine three times a day.
You need to rest for two days.
The bus stop is over there.
How many stops until the city center?

items.kk: Бұл автобус темір жол вокзалына барады ма?
items.en: Does this bus go to the railway station?
I need a ticket to Almaty.
The train leaves in twenty minutes.
I need to find a hotel.
Do you have any rooms available?
How much is a room per night?
I would like a room with a view.
What time is check-out?
I think it will rain tomorrow.
If it rains, I will stay at home.

items.kk: Ақшам болса, мен көбірек саяхат жасар едім.
items.en: If I had money, I would travel more.
When I finish work, I will call you.

items.kk: Суық болғанына қарамастан, біз серуенге шықтық.
items.en: Although it was cold, we went for a walk.
She is taller than her brother.
Kazakh is more difficult than Russian.
This is the most expensive shop in the city.
She runs faster than me.

items.kk: Қаншалықты көп жаттықсаң, соншалықты жақсырақ боласың.
items.en: The more you practise, the better you get.
I have never been to China.

items.kk: Сен бұрын жылқы еті жеп көрдің бе?
items.en: Have you ever tried horse meat?
I have already eaten.
I have not eaten yet.

items.kk: Мен келгенде, ол кетіп қойған болатын.
items.en: She had already left when I arrived.
He said that he was tired.
She asked where I lived.
I told him to wait.
They asked us not to be late.

items.kk: Маған кездесу бас тартылды деп айтты.
items.en: I was told that the meeting was cancelled.
